line: DAT DRAGON GONNA EAT SQUEE!
Squee don't like dem wings. Squee don't like dem claws. Squee don't like none of it!
It breathin' fire! RUN RUN RUN!
Dat dragon got eyes like two big burnin' suns and Squee don't wanna be nowhere near dat!
Squee seen a lotta scary tings but dat dragon is de scariest ting by a hundred gabillion miles!
Why dey always gotta be so BIG? Why dey can't be little tiny dragons Squee could step on?
Squee don't volunteer for dis! Squee wuz volunteered by somebody else!
De ground is shakin' and dat means de dragon is comin' and Squee is LEAVIN'!
Aieeee! It spotted Squee! IT SPOTTED SQUEE!
Squee too small ta be worth eatin'! Squee just skin and bones! Not even a snack!
Zombies! ZOMBIES! Oh Squee don't like dis not one little bit!
Dey already dead and dey still comin'! Dat ain't fair! Dat ain't right!
Squee seen dead tings before but dey usually STAY dead!
One zombie Squee can handle. Maybe. Two zombies? Squee is runnin'. Hundred zombies? SQUEE ALREADY GONE!
Why do dey smell like dat? Why dey always gotta smell like dat?!
Dere shufflin' dis way and Squee's legs ain't workin' right on account of de terror!
Squee don't wanna become one of dem! Squee like bein' alive! Mostly!
De whole army of dem dead tings! Who thought dis wuz a good idea?!
It touched Squee! De zombie touched Squee's arm! Somebody cut dat arm off right now!
Dey don't stop! You hit 'em and dey keep comin'! DIS IS A NIGHTMARE!
SPIDER! BIG SPIDER! BIGGEST SPIDER SQUEE EVER SAW!
How many legs is dat? Eight? Eight is too many legs! Dat's too many!
Squee not afraid of much but Squee draw de line at tings dat big wit dat many eyes!
It's droppin' from de ceilin'! IT'S DROPPIN' FROM DE CEILIN'!
Squee don't go nowhere dere might be spiders. Dis place got spiders. Squee leavin'.
De web stickin' ta Squee! GET IT OFF GET IT OFF GET IT OFF!
De whole tunnel full of webs! Who walks inta a tunnel full of webs?! Squee, apparently. SQUEE IS SO STUPID SOMETIMES.
Dat sea monster got tentacles bigger dan a whole ship and Squee don't wanna be on dis boat no more!
Sumpthing grabbed Squee's foot under de water! SUMPTHING GRABBED SQUEE'S FOOT!
Dere's tings in de water. Big tings. Hungry-lookin' tings. Squee not swimmin' today.
De water all around and dat monster circlin' and Squee too young ta die! Well. Old enough but still!
What de hell is dat ting? How it got so many teeth?!
Squee see de fin. Squee see de BIG fin. Squee want ta go home now.
De whole ocean could be full of dose tings and we just sailin' around on top of it like IDIOTS!
It capsized de whole boat just by BUMPIN' it! What is dat TING?!
Squee don't trust no water he can't see de bottom of. Dis water goes down forever. NOT GOOD.
De kraken! IT'S DE KRAKEN! Somebody do sumpthing! Squee is prayin' over here but it probably not helpin'!
Vampire! Dat's a vampire! Squee can tell from de teeth and de pale and de FLOATIN'!
It don't bleed when you cut it! WHAT IS DAT? WHAT IS DAT TING?!
De werewolf is sniffin' around and Squee is downwind and dis is de worst day of Squee's life!
Squee not gonna look at de demon. Squee just gonna close his eyes and hope de demon not hungry.
TROLL! Big ugly troll under de bridge and Squee has ta cross dat bridge!
De hydra grew back all tree heads Squee cut off! It got MORE heads now! How is dat fair?!
Squee wuz just walkin'. Squee wuz just walkin' along and de lich showed up! Squee din't do nuthin'!
De basilisk lookin' right at Squee! Don't look! DON'T LOOK AT ITS EYES!
Dat's a manticore. Squee seen pictures. Dat's definitely a manticore and Squee is definitely dead.
De phoenix on fire! De whole bird on FIRE! Squee not gettin' near dat no matter who asks!
Dis cave is dark and Squee don't like dark and dere's probly tings in de dark what eat goblins!
De walls real close together and de ceilin' real low and Squee feel like de whole mountain gonna squish him!
Squee hear drippin'. Drippin' means water. Water means flood. FLOOD MEANS SQUEE DROWNS!
How far underground is we? Squee don't know and dat's de most scared Squee ever been!
What if de exit cave in? What if we stuck in here forever? WHAT IF WE STUCK IN HERE FOREVER?!
Squee don't volunteer for cave missions. Squee on record as not volunteerin' for dis.
Sumpthing movin' in de dark. Squee hear it. Squee hear de scratchin'!
De torch goin' out! DE TORCH IS GOIN' OUT! SOMEBODY KEEP DE TORCH GOIN'!
Squee hate caves. Squee hate dungeons. Squee hate anywhere underground. Dis ain't a surprise ta nobody.
De bats! De whole ceiling is BATS! DON'T SCARE DE BATS!
Dis dungeon got traps everywhere and Squee de one who gotta walk in front! HOW IS DAT FAIR?!
De floor made of bones. BONES. Somebody died here. LOTS of somebodies. Squee not gonna be next!
Every door in dis dungeon got sumpthing terrible behind it! Every single one! Squee openin' no more doors!
Dere's a pit. Right in front of Squee. Big dark pit dat go down forever. Squee almost walked right in!
De swamp smellin' like dead tings and Squee's feet sinkin' and Squee don't like one single ting about dis!
Squee can't tell what's solid ground and what's quicksand! DIS IS A TERRIBLE PLACE!
De swamp gas make tings look like dey movin' when dey ain't. Or dey movin' and dey really is movin'. SQUEE CAN'T TELL!
Sumpthing under de swamp water just bumped Squee's leg. SUMPTHING UNDER DE SWAMP WATER BUMPED SQUEE!
De volcano rumblin' and dey wanna go INSIDE it?! WHO RAISED DESE PEOPLE?!
Lava! Real actual lava! Right dere! Squee not prepared for dis level of hot!
De ground got cracks in it and de cracks got fire in dem! Squee don't wanna fall inta no fire cracks!
It too hot! Everything too hot! Squee's eyebrows burnin' off just from standin' here!
De dark room got no light and Squee can't see nuthin' and Squee is NOT okay wit dis!
Squee hear heavy breathin' in de dark and it ain't Squee's breathin'!
Who turned de lights out?! Was it you?! WAS IT YOU?!
De haunted forest got trees what move! Squee saw it! DE TREES ARE MOVIN'!
Dere's no way out dat Squee can see! Dere's walls all around! HOW DO WE GET OUT?!
Arrows! Dey shootin' ARROWS at Squee! Squee too small and too fast but also too scared!
De whole army comin' over dat hill and dere's only like tree of us and Squee is TERRIBLE at math but dat seems bad!
EXPLOSION! Right next ta Squee! Squee's ears not workin' right! Squee's everythin' not workin' right!
Dey flankin' us! Dey comin' from both sides! Squee don't know which way ta run!
De catapult loading up again and Squee only got so many places ta hide!
Squee hit! Squee was almost hit! De arrow went RIGHT past Squee's ear! Squee can feel de wind from it!
De siege engines! Dey brought siege engines! WHO AUTHORIZED DIS?!
Charge?! CHARGE?! Squee not chargin' nuthin'! Squee counter-chargin' in de opposite direction!
Dat sword went past Squee's head so close Squee felt it take a little hair!
Dere's fire everywhere! De battlefield all on fire! WHERE IS SAFE?! WHERE?!
De retreat horn! FINALLY somebody blew de retreat horn! Squee been retreatin' for ten minutes already!
Squee not a soldier! Squee made dis very clear! SQUEE NOT A SOLDIER!
What de hell is dat bomb? Who got a bomb dat big? DIS NOT A FAIR FIGHT!
De commander sayin' 'hold de line' but de line is very bad right now and Squee not feelin' de line!
Dey got a dragon too?! DEY GOT A DRAGON TOO?! DIS IS CHEATIN'!
Squee don't surrender because Squee already runnin' away since five minutes ago!
Dey want Squee ta go in dere? In de thing? Wit de bad stuff and de danger and de probable death?
Squee gots a better idea where Squee don't do dat and everybody survive!
Why always Squee? Why not somebody bigger? Or somebody who don't value dere life so much?
Squee do dis under protest. Official protest. Squee want it written down dat dis wuz under protest.
What's de survival rate on dis? What? No don't tell Squee. Actually tell Squee. No don't. OKAY TELL SQUEE.
Squee technically could do dat ting. But Squee also technically could not do dat ting and still be alive.
Dere a safer way ta do dis? Dere's gotta be a safer way ta do dis! Has anybody looked for a safer way?!
Squee will do it. But Squee wanna register a formal complaint wit somebody important first.
Dis feel like a 'Squee comes back minus several important parts' kinda mission.
Last one who did dis job came back in a bucket. SQUEE KNOW DIS.
You want Squee ta be de bait? De BAIT?! Squee is a person! A small person but still a person!
Squee gonna do it fast so Squee can be terrified and done wit it instead of terrified and draggin' it out.
Squee sneak inta de evil fortress? Alone? At night? Wit no backup? Squee acceptin' dis very calmly considerinin' how BAD it is!
Defuse de what now? De bomb? De TICKING bomb? SQUEE NEVER DEFUSED NUTHIN'!
Squee jump across dat chasm? Squee look at dat chasm. Squee look at Squee's legs. Squee say: no.
De storm comin'! De big black clouds and de lightning and de angry sky! RUN!
Squee got struck by lightning once and it not fun and Squee not want it ta happen again!
De wind takin' Squee's hat! Now de wind takin' SQUEE! HOLD ONTO SQUEE!
Dat tornado just appeared out of NOWHERE! Dere wuz no tornado and now dere IS one! HOW?!
De rain so hard Squee can't see nuthin'! Squee could walk off a cliff and not know it till he fallin'!
EARTHQUAKE! De ground shakin'! Squee don't trust no ground dat shakes!
De big crack openin' up right under Squee's feet! DE CRACK OPENIN' UNDER SQUEE!
Buildin's fallin'! De whole city fallin' apart! Every buildin' Squee loved is gone!
De flood comin' down de valley fast and Squee short and dat water gonna be over Squee's head real quick!
Water comin' in under de door! Water comin' in under DE DOOR! WE GONNA DROWN!
De wave too big! Squee seen big waves. Dis bigger dan all de other big waves combined!
Blizzard! Squee can't feel Squee's feet! Squee can't feel nuthin'! IS SQUEE DEAD ALREADY?!
De lightning hittin' de mast! De ship on fire in a storm! HOW IS DIS POSSIBLE?!
De sky turned de wrong color! Sky not supposed ta be dat color! DAT IS A BAD COLOR!
Hail de size of Squee's head! Squee's HEAD is gettin' hit by HAIL DE SIZE OF SQUEE'S HEAD!
De spell goin' wrong! Squee can feel it goin' wrong! Dere's sparks where dere shouldn't be sparks!
WHO LET DE MAGIC GO SIDEWAYS?! WHO WUZ RESPONSIBLE?!
De portal openin' up and it not de right color portal! Wrong color portals is BAD!
Squee don't know what dat spell supposed ta do but it definitely not supposed ta do DAT!
De mage's eyes glowin' de wrong color. Squee seen dat before. Dat's a REAL BAD SIGN.
Sumpthing comin' through de portal and it real big and it definitely not friendly!
Squee turned inta sumpthing! Squee feel different! WHAT SQUEE IS NOW?!
De curse! Somebody put a curse on Squee! Squee KNEW today felt cursed!
De magic circle crackin'! It not supposed ta crack! NOBODY SAID IT COULD CRACK!
Squee accidentally ate de magic mushroom and now de colors is loud and de sounds is purple!
De necrotic energy spreadin' and Squee felt it touch him! SQUEE FELT IT TOUCH HIM!
Somebody reverse de spell! SOMEBODY REVERSE DE SPELL! IT BACKWARDS!
Squee wuz just standin' dere and de magical explosion went off and now Squee's hat on inside out!
De rift in reality openin' up and stuff from de other side lookin' through! CLOSE IT! CLOSE IT!
De summoning workin' TOO good! It too much! STOP DE SUMMONING!
How HIGH is dis?! Squee can't even see de ground! WHERE IS DE GROUND?!
Squee is fallin'! SQUEE IS FALLIN'! Do sumpthing! SUMPTHING!
Don't look down. Don't look down. Oh Squee looked down. SQUEE LOOKED DOWN.
De plank too thin and de drop too far and Squee's legs gone all wibbly!
Dis bridge swayin'! Bridges not supposed ta sway! DIS BRIDGE IS BROKEN!
Squee on de back of a flyin' ting! Squee on de BACK of a FLYIN' TING! WHO OKAYED DIS?!
De griffin bankin' and Squee slidin'! SQUEE SLIDIN' OFF DE GRIFFIN!
Squee not built for heights! Squee built for low ta de ground! Squee center of gravity is LOW!
De rope breakin'! Squee hear it fraying! Squee can count de fibers! One fiber left! ZERO FIBERS!
Magic carpet goin' too fast and de wind takin' Squee's face in de wrong direction!
Dis tower too tall. Way too tall. Who built a tower dis tall? For WHAT PURPOSE?!
Squee not afraid of heights. Squee afraid of de sudden stop at de bottom. Very different.
De ledge crumblin' under Squee's feet! CRUMBLIN'! Like it made of CRUMBLES!
Flying ship hittin' a storm cloud and dropping and Squee's stomach still up where de ship wuz!
Squee fell off! Squee actually fell off! Squee fallin' right now! DIS IS REALLY HAPPENIN'!
Dey left! Everybody left and dey din't take Squee! SQUEE IS HERE! COME BACK!
Squee hear de ship leavin'! DAT'S DE SHIP! WAIT FOR SQUEE! WAIT!
Hello? Hello? Is anybody dere? It just Squee? It JUST SQUEE?!
Dey forgot Squee again. Squee don't know why dis keep happenin' but it keep happenin'.
Squee been in dis room for tree hours! Nobody come for Squee! Squee start ta wonder if he matter!
De whole dungeon and it just Squee in it! JUST SQUEE! ALL DE MONSTERS AND JUST SQUEE!
Squee gonna count ta ten and if nobody back by ten Squee gonna PANIC. One. Two. TEN! PANIC!
Gerrard? Sisay? Anybody? Hello? DE ECHO ANSWERIN' SQUEE AND NOT DEM!
Dey always say 'Squee wait here' but nobody say how LONG Squee wait here!
Squee all alone in de scary forest and de sun goin' down and Squee ain't got no fire!
Squee de only one who ain't been rescued! EVERYBODY ELSE GOT RESCUED! WHERE IS SQUEE'S RESCUE?!
What if somethin' happened ta everybody and Squee is de last one? Squee not ready ta be de last one!
Dis island just Squee and some birds and de birds look at Squee like he food!
Squee left behind AGAIN. Squee makin' a list of every time dis happen and it a real long list!
Dey took de boat! Dey took DE ONLY BOAT and now Squee on dis rock by hisself!
What IS dat? What is dat ting and why it lookin' at Squee like dat?
Dis food movin'! De food on Squee's plate is MOVIN'! Squee don't eat nothin' dat move!
It got tree heads and none of dem got ears and Squee got so many questions but also is runnin' away!
What de hell is dat machine? It got gears where gears don't belong and it hummin' at Squee real suspicious!
Dis contraption got buttons and Squee accidentally pushed one and NOW LOOK AT IT!
Dey eat wit forks but dey hold de fork de wrong way and Squee can't stop starin' at it!
De custom here is Squee gotta touch de weird glowy orb? De GLOWY ORB? Squee don't know about dat.
What dey pointin' at? Why dey all pointin' at Squee? IS IT A POINTIN' CUSTOM OR IS SQUEE IN TROUBLE?!
Dis food smell like feet and look like mud and dey very offended dat Squee not want it.
De alien ting try ta communicate wit Squee but de sounds it makin' is shapes Squee can't hear!
Dey bow ta de big rock and den dey expect Squee ta bow ta de big rock and Squee has questions!
De technology doin' tings wit no hands touchin' it! It movin' BY ITSELF! MAGIC OR WORSE!
What is dat smell? Dat's de weirdest smell Squee ever smelled and Squee worked on a ship!
De floor transparent! De floor TRANSPARENT and Squee walkin' on nothin' right now! NOTHIN'!
De elves think Squee is funny but not in a good way and dey whisperin' and Squee hear every word!
Squee's life is bad. Not just a little bad. Comprehensively, extensively, thoroughly bad.
Every mission Squee go on, Squee almost die at least tree times. Squee got a system for countin' now.
Dey get treasure. Squee get to carry de treasure. How is dat a reward?!
Squee been helpful a hundred thousand million times and nobody never say 'good job, Squee.' NOT ONCE.
Squee job description definitely din't include 'bait for large predators' but here Squee is.
Squee not paid enough for dis. Squee not paid at all for dis actually. What is Squee doin' here?
Dey say Squee important ta de team. Den dey leave Squee behind. WHICH ONE IS IT.
Squee been regeneratin' for how long now? Centuries? And what Squee got ta show for it? DIS.
Nobody ask Squee's opinion on nuthin'. Den when sumpthing go wrong dey look at Squee like it his fault!
De worst part of today wuz de beginning. And de middle. And right now. All of it wuz de worst part.
Squee ready ta quit right now. Only reason Squee still here: Squee gots nowhere else ta be. Dat's it.
Squee carry de heavy tings, Squee open de scary doors, Squee taste de suspicious food. Squee do everything!
If Squee had a gold piece for every time somebody almost got Squee killed, Squee could BUY a safe life!
Squee gots a sore back, sore feet, sore everything, and nobody never ask if Squee feel okay.
De Weatherlight crew real brave and adventurous and Squee just real tired mostly.
Gerrard get all de glory. Squee get all de bruises. DAT AIN'T RIGHT AND SQUEE KNOW IT.
Dis de tenth terrible ting dis week. Squee countin'. TENTH.
Squee's immortality don't mean nuthin' if every death is PAINFUL and EMBARRASSING.
One day. Squee want ONE day where nuthin' bad happen. Just ONE day.
Nobody never write songs about what Squee done. Dey write songs about everybody else!
AIEEEE!
RUN! EVERYBODY RUN!
We all gonna die!
Done for!
Squee not ready!
Too big! Too BIG!
Nononononono!
Help! HELP!
Squee gonna be sick.
Oh no oh no oh no oh no.
WHAT DE HECK IS DAT!!
Not Squee! PLEASE not Squee!
Squee see de white light. Squee see it. Dis de end.
Everybody stop makin' decisions without Squee's input! De decisions always bad!
Squee's heart doin' de thing where it beat too fast and too hard and Squee can hear it!
De dragon sniffin' for Squee! It can SMELL Squee! Squee should of taken a bath! NOW SQUEE DEAD CAUSE OF NOT BATHIN'!
Squee hid under de rock but de dragon already know where Squee is. Squee can tell by de smug look.
De fire breath headin' straight for Squee and Squee gonna dodge it and if Squee don't den Squee had a good run!
Dragon egg! DRAGON EGG! And it crackin' and de mama dragon very close by! MOVE! MOVE!
Squee accidentally woke de dragon. Squee didn't MEAN to wake de dragon but Squee did wake de dragon.
Four zombie hands grabbin' at Squee! Squee countin' de hands! FOUR ZOMBIE HANDS!
Squee wuz de one who said don't open de tomb! Squee wuz right! AND HERE WE ARE!
De zombie moan sound like 'Squee'! It moanin' SQUEE'S NAME! IT KNOW SQUEE!
De spider web vibratin'! De spider know Squee is here! DE SPIDER COMIN'!
Squee walkin' through de forest real peaceful and den: spider de size of a HOUSE. Just. Dere.
De sea serpent! Squee see de coils! Dose coils bigger dan de whole ship!
De water drainin' out of de area real fast and dat means de big ting under de water comin' UP!
Squee gots a real bad feelin' about dis cave. Squee feelin' is usually right. SQUEE FEELIN' RIGHT.
De stalactites look like teeth. De cave look like a MOUTH. Squee walkin' inta a MOUTH.
De cave echo makin' Squee's scared voice sound like ten scared Squees and dat make Squee more scared!
Squee's footsteps too loud in dis cave! Every step like a announcement! HERE SQUEE IS! COME EAT SQUEE!
De dungeon smell like old death and new death and Squee don't wanna add ta de smell!
Poison dart! POISON DART! Just missed Squee by a finger width! A FINGER WIDTH!
De lava gettin' closer! It flowin' slow but sure and dere only so many ways out of dis room!
De volcano bout ta blow! Squee can feel it in de ground! GET OUT GET OUT GET OUT!
Dis place cursed! Every cave and dungeon and swamp dey take Squee to is CURSED!
De shadows in dis room is wrong. Squee know what shadows supposed ta do and dis ain't it.
Cannonball! Squee see it comin'! CANNONBALL COMIN' RIGHT AT SQUEE!
Dey got ten soldiers for every one of us! TEN! Squee not great at math but Squee know dat's bad!
Squee runnin' as fast as Squee can run and de cavalry still gainin'!
De bomb lit! IT LIT! SOMEBODY THROW IT SOMEWHERE ELSE REAL FAST!
Squee wound! Squee got a wound! It real shallow but Squee gonna act like it isn't!
De arrows blockin' out de sun! Dere so many arrows dey blockin' DE SUN!
Squee not a coward. Squee a strategist. And de strategy right now is RUN.
De reinforcements comin' from de north AND de south! WHERE'S SQUEE'S REINFORCEMENTS?!
Squee's sword too small for dis fight! Squee need a bigger sword! Or ta not be in dis fight! SECOND OPTION!
De magic user on dere side real good at de magic. Squee see what dey just did. Squee not happy.
Climb inta de thing and go inside de horrible place and find de horrible ting and bring it back. Right. Sure. ABSOLUTELY NOT.
Squee don't mind helpin'. Squee mind dyin' while helpin'. Dere a DIFFERENCE.
Squee can do dis. Squee done harder tings. Wait. Has Squee done harder tings? Squee thinkin'. No. No Squee hasn't.
De mission sound simple when dey explain it but den Squee get dere and it NOT simple!
Dey said low risk! DIS IS NOT LOW RISK! DIS IS MAXIMUM RISK!
Who else could do dis? Squee name a hundred people who could do dis instead of Squee!
Squee not trained for dis! Nobody trained Squee for DIS!
If Squee die doin' dis, Squee want it on de record: SQUEE OBJECTED.
De lightning strike right next ta Squee! DE SMELL! DE NOISE! Squee's hair all standin' up!
De wind howlin' like it angry at Squee specifically!
Squee can see de funnel cloud formin'! It comin' dis way! IT COMIN' DIS WAY!
De sky openin' up and what comin' out ain't rain, it's ice chunks, and one of dem hit Squee!
De ground under Squee splittin' apart from de earthquake! SPLITTIN'! SQUEE ON ONE SIDE AND EVERYBODY ON DE OTHER!
Buildings fallin' down all around Squee and Squee runnin' through it like a very scared rat!

De water risin' fast and Squee can't climb and de ting Squee on gettin' smaller and smaller!
De snow up ta Squee's neck! Squee basically buried! SOMEBODY DIG SQUEE OUT!
Squee never felt cold like dis cold. Dis cold is a mean cold. A personal cold.
De spell reflectin' off de wall and comin' back at everybody! DODGE! DODGE! SQUEE DODGIN'!
Dat wizard laughin' in a bad way! When wizards laugh like dat de magic always go terrible!
De summoning gone wrong and now dere a hole in de world and tings from outside de world comin' in!
Squee feelin' de magic buildin' up and it too much and it gonna blow and EVERYBODY GET DOWN!
What de spell supposed ta do is one ting. What de spell actually doin' is a DIFFERENT TERRIBLE TING!
Squee got transfigured inta a... what Squee is now? Squee check. Squee is a newt. SQUEE IS A NEWT!
De enchantment not wearin' off! It supposed ta wear off! WHY IT NOT WEARIN' OFF?!
Squee hold de magic artifact for two seconds and now everything within ten feet is on fire. Noted.
De rift smellin' like cold ozone and wrong dimensions and Squee don't wanna go through it!
Whatever dat spell is, Squee real sure it shouldn't make dat sound.
It too far down. WAY too far down. Squee measurin' wit his eyes and de number is TOO MANY FEET!
De scaffold swayin' and Squee can feel every sway in his whole body!
Squee's stomach somewhere behind him from movin' so fast at dis altitude!
De wyvern flying weird! Squee can tell de wyvern flying WRONG! DIS A PROBLEM!
Squee dangling by one hand over a very big drop and Squee's grip real sweaty right now!
De bridge swung out from under Squee's feet! Just SWUNG AWAY! Now it Squee and de air and DE GROUND DOWN DERE!
Squee thought dis cloud wuz solid! IT NOT SOLID! SQUEE FALLIN' THROUGH DE CLOUD!
From up here Squee can see how far is far. IT REAL FAR.
De flying carpet unraveling! One thread! One thread left in dis carpet! SQUEE ON IT!
Squee survived de fall but not de landing. Well. Squee survived de landing too but it wuz CLOSE.
Dey all gotta come back! Squee don't do well alone! Squee KNOW dis about hisself!
Squee hear steps! Oh wait. Dat's Squee's own steps. False alarm. Or... is it? It could still be someone comin'.
Four walls and Squee and nobody else and de walls real close and Squee real uncomfortable!
Every sound in dis empty place is de scariest sound. Every drip. Every creak. Every nuthin'.
Squee been alone before but not in a HAUNTED PLACE alone! Dere levels ta dis!
If dey not back by de time Squee count ta a hundred Squee gonna be very upset. One. Two. HUNDRED. UPSET.
Squee singin' ta hisself so it not so quiet. But de singin' soundin' sad so Squee stop singin'.
Squee technically survivin' right now but only technically.
Dey said back in ten minutes. Dat wuz three hours ago. By Squee's count. AND SQUEE COUNTIN'.
Why nobody leave Squee a weapon at least? Just Squee alone in de dark wit no weapon? WHOSE PLAN WUZ DIS?
De weird blue light comin' from de machine and Squee's skin turnin' blue in de glow and Squee look like a dead ting!
Dey callin' it 'technology' but it definitely magic and it definitely mad at Squee!
De device beepin' faster. IT BEEPIN' FASTER. FASTER BEEPIN' IS BAD IN SQUEE'S EXPERIENCE!
Everybody here eat de bugs on purpose! Like a DELICACY! And dey lookin' at Squee ta try one!
De meat purple. Purple meat. Squee never eat purple meat. Squee gonna keep dat record goin'.
It wuz food but den it MOVED and now Squee don't know what it is but it ain't food no more!
Dere greeting is stickin' dere finger in Squee's ear! DAT'S HOW DEY SAY HELLO! SQUEE DON'T LIKE IT!
Dey laughin' at Squee but Squee don't know de joke and dat's de most uncomfortable Squee ever been!
Dis place got no doors, just holes in de wall, and Squee can't protect hisself from holes in de wall!
De sky here two suns and de light make shadows go two directions and Squee can't tell where he is!
De local language sound like Squee's language but every word mean sumpthing terrible!
Squee been doin' dis for years. YEARS. And de pay same as day one. Which wuz no pay. YEARS OF NO PAY.
De title Squee got is 'cabin boy.' Squee older dan everybody on dis ship probably. 'CABIN BOY.'
Squee clean de whole ship and nobody notice. Squee leave one spot and EVERYBODY NOTICE.
Dey ask Squee's opinion and den do de opposite ting every single time. EVERY SINGLE TIME.
Squee carry de pack, Squee carry de supplies, Squee carry DE OTHER PACK. Squee basically a pack animal now.
Somebody gotta clean up after de battle and somehow it always Squee.
Squee immortal. Dat should be special. But everybody use it as a excuse ta put Squee inta de most dangerous tings!
